claim: Claude Code can be used for multi-file project generation and scaffolding, not just code review and chat
actionable: Use Claude Code to generate entire project structures; specify file paths and desired outputs to avoid hallucination and ensure consistency
source_title: How to Use Claude Code Skills Like the 1% (it’s easy actually)

claim: Effective Claude Code prompting requires specifying exact file paths, output formats, and constraints to minimize errors
actionable: In Claude Code prompts, list exact file paths, specify output format, and include edge cases; avoid vague instructions
source_title: How to Use Claude Code Skills Like the 1% (it’s easy actually)
